title: Integer MIMO Precoder: Minimal-Operation Linear Straight-Line Program
strategies: independent binary double-and-add per output linear form (trivial / reference)
per-coefficient best-of binary vs canonical-signed-digit recoding (greedy)
signed-digit recoding plus global common-subexpression elimination sharing power-of-two multiples across outputs (strong)
true minimum-addition-sequence / graph-based multiple-constant-multiplication below the CSE bound (open ceiling, uncovered)
